states.name: Gargancrab
states.title: Gargancrab
states.description: These strange land crabs grow so quickly that they shed their rocky shells monthly. Some brave farmers cultivate them for building materials, which cuts down on mining.

states.name: Leviacrab
states.title: Leviacrab
states.description: Evolved Gargancrabs not only shed their rocky carapaces, but also trace amounts of precious jewels. Unfortunately for crab farmers, they're far more vicious than their unevolved relatives.
